workflow.candidate_name: 家庭旅行邀请函与纪念海报制作

candidates.name: 适老亲子家庭短途旅行规划
家庭旅行邀请函与纪念海报制作

evidence.locator: evidence cohort: accepted vertical invitation poster

candidates.rationale: Produces a visual family-group artifact with a distinct layout and visual QA contract.

selection_confirmation.answer: 只生成家庭旅行邀请函与纪念海报制作 Skill，排除旅行规划。

trigger.summary: Create concise, mobile-readable family trip invitations and commemorative posters from an accepted itinerary.
do_not_use: 从零规划旅行路线、酒店或景点

items.statement: Turn an accepted itinerary into a concise vertical family invitation that emphasizes companionship, route story, and only the essential day markers.

evidence.locator: accepted poster correction: invitation rather than guide

items.rationale: The communication hierarchy generalizes without retaining Yueyang-specific copy.

items.statement: Check text bounds, contrast, information density, and mobile-size readability before delivery.
items.rationale: These checks come from the mobile visual-delivery format.

items.statement: This run used the title 出发吧！岳阳见, two dated day labels, a vertical format, limited hand-drawn accents, and large solid-color information areas.

evidence.locator: final poster title, dates, and style correction

items.rationale: Title, dates, destination, and visual direction may change on the next invitation.

items.statement: Do not turn a family invitation into a dense travel-guide infographic.

evidence.locator: final correction: do not make a tourism-guide long image

items.rationale: The prevention rule generalizes across family invitation designs.
items.abstracted_rule: Match information density to the communication purpose rather than copying all source details.

items.statement: Preparing an invitation does not authorize sending it to a family group or publishing it; obtain fresh authorization before either action.
items.rationale: Sending or publishing affects other people and requires current authorization.

questions.prompt: Keep sending and publishing as separately authorized actions?
questions.recommended_answer: Yes — preparing the invitation does not authorize distribution.

confirmations.answer: 确认，发送或发布前需要单独授权。
